channel.title: Qemu on M2kar - Security World
channel.description: Recent content in Qemu on M2kar - Security World

item.title: 【论文笔记】HALucinator 虚拟化硬件层模拟启动固件
item.description: 标题:HALucinator: Firmware Re-hosting Through Abstraction Layer Emulation 作者: Abraham A Clements, Eric Gustafson; Tobias Scharnowski; Paul Grosen; David Fritz; Christopher Kruegel and Giovanni Vigna; Saurabh Bagchi; Mathias Payer 来源: USENIX Security 2020 链接: https://www.usenix.org/conference/usenixsecurity20/presentation/clements 引用: Clements, A. A., Gustafson, E., Scharnowski, T., Grosen, P., Fritz, D., Kruegel, C.,
